```
# FILE 1: BACKEND_ARCHITECTURE_DIAGRAM.md

# Back-End Architecture & Circuit Diagram Reference
[Refer to Generated Diagram 0: Multi-Tenant FastAPI SaaS Stack]

## SYSTEM FLOW BREAKDOWN
1. CLIENT REQUEST вҶ’ HTTP/S вҶ’ FastAPI Gateway (CORS, Request ID, Global Exception Handler)
2. AUTH & RBAC вҶ’ JWT Validation вҶ’ Role Extraction (User/Admin/Superadmin) вҶ’ Tenant Isolation Check
3. RATE LIMITING вҶ’ Redis Sliding Window вҶ’ IP + User ID throttling вҶ’ 429 on breach
4. CREDIT MIDDLEWARE вҶ’ Redis Distributed Lock вҶ’ PostgreSQL Ledger Read вҶ’ Balance Check вҶ’ Estimate Deduction
5. INTENT ROUTER вҶ’ Pydantic Validation вҶ’ Intent Classification (Planning/Proposal/Admin) вҶ’ Session State Load
6. RAG PIPELINE вҶ’ Query Embedding (multilingual-e5-large) вҶ’ pgvector IVFFlat/HNSW Search вҶ’ Context Chunk Rerank вҶ’ Redis Cache (TTL 15m)
7. LITELLM ROUTER вҶ’ Model Selection (Priority/Cost/Health) вҶ’ Async LLM Call вҶ’ Streaming SSE вҶ’ Fallback Chain
8. GUARD RAIL вҶ’ PII Regex/NER Scan вҶ’ Redaction Log вҶ’ Compliance Check вҶ’ Hallucination Cross-Verify вҶ’ Safety Score
9. RESPONSE STREAM вҶ’ Chunked SSE вҶ’ Frontend вҶ’ Actual Token Cost Deduction вҶ’ Ledger Write вҶ’ Audit Log

## CIRCUIT BREAKER & FAILSAFE PATHS
- LLM Timeout вҶ’ 3s вҶ’ Retry Primary вҶ’ Failover to Secondary вҶ’ Return Cached/Safe Response
- DB Connection Drop вҶ’ Retry 3x вҶ’ Fail to Maintenance Mode вҶ’ Queue Requests
- Credit Lock Race вҶ’ Redis SETNX вҶ’ Atomic Deduction вҶ’ Rollback on API Failure
- Vector Index Fail вҶ’ Fallback to BM25 Text Search вҶ’ Degrade Gracefully
```

```
## CIRCUIT & ERROR HANDLING PATHS
```

```
# FILE 3: FRONTEND_COMPLETE_DESIGN_SPECS.md

# Front-End Page Designs, Styles & Components

## GLOBAL DESIGN SYSTEM
- Framework: Next.js 14 App Router, TypeScript Strict, TailwindCSS, Shadcn UI
- Theme: Light/Dark mode, Primary: #6366F1 (Indigo), Secondary: #14B8A6 (Teal), Surface: #F8FAFC
- Typography: Inter (UI), Noto Sans Devanagari (Hinglish), Mono (Code/JSON)
- Layout: Responsive 12-grid, Max-width 1280px, Sidebar collapsible, Header sticky

## PAGE: /dashboard
- Layout: 3-column grid (Left: Nav 250px, Center: Main 70%, Right: Context 300px)
- Components: CompanySelector (Dropdown), CreditBadge (Pill with progress ring), QuickActions (4-icon grid), RecentDocs (Table with status badges)
- Interactions: Hover lift on cards, click expands modal, drag-and-drop reorder for widgets
- States: Loading skeleton, Empty state illustration, Error toast

## PAGE: /planning/[sessionId]
- Layout: Split view (Chat 65%, Sidebar 35%)
- Components: 
  - ChatStream: Message bubbles (AI: gradient bg, User: solid bg), TypingIndicator, Pause/Resume btn
  - AnswerInput: Textarea with autocomplete, Voice input icon, Submit arrow
  - ContextSidebar: Live JSONB tree view, Progress ring (10/10 Qs), AI Suggestion chips
  - InlineEdit: Pencil icon on answers, Diff viewer modal, Version dropdown
- Interactions: SSE streaming append, Scroll-to-bottom auto, Keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Enter submit)
- States: Streaming, Error (retry btn), Complete (Generate Doc CTA), Offline queue

## PAGE: /documents/[docId]
- Layout: Full-width viewer with top toolbar
- Components: PreviewFrame (PDF/Excel/PPT renderer), ExportDropdown (Format, Template, Watermark), MetadataPanel (Industry, Date, Credits)
- Interactions: Zoom controls, Page navigation, Download trigger, Share link copy
- States: Loading spinner, Render error, Download progress bar

## PAGE: /billing
- Layout: 2-column (Plans left, Usage right)
- Components: PlanComparison (3 cards, highlight active), CheckoutModal (Razorpay embed), UsageChart (Bar by model/type), LedgerTable (Pagination, filters)
- Interactions: Plan switch animation, Webhook sync indicator, Top-up form validation
- States: Processing payment, Success confetti, Failed retry, Empty ledger

## PAGE: /admin/*
- Layout: Sidebar nav + main content area
- Components: 
  - QueueTable: Paginated, Bulk select, Approve/Reject/Edit modals, Status badges
  - ModelRegistry: Cards with provider dropdown, API key mask, Test btn, Toggle switch
  - MetricsPanel: Line charts (Latency, Errors), Gauge (Credits/min), Log stream
- Interactions: Optimistic row update, Drag priority slider, Real-time polling indicator
- States: Pending approval highlight, Test success/fail toast, Unauthorized fallback

## COMPONENT LIBRARY SPECS
- Buttons: Variant (default, destructive, outline, ghost), Size (sm, md, lg), Loading spinner
- Forms: Input, Textarea, Select, Checkbox, Radio, Form error messages inline
- Feedback: Toast (success, error, warning, info), Badge (status, tier, risk), Progress
- Navigation: Sidebar, Breadcrumb, Tabs, Pagination, DropdownMenu
- Data Display: Table (sortable, filterable, row actions), Card, Avatar, Skeleton
```

```
# FILE 4: BACKEND_COMPLETE_MODULE_SPECS.md

# Back-End Module Designs, Endpoints & Logic

## MODULE: AUTH & MULTI-TENANCY
- Endpoints: POST /auth/login, POST /auth/register, POST /auth/refresh, GET /auth/me
- Logic: JWT issuance (access 15m, refresh 7d), bcrypt hash, RBAC decorator @require_role, RLS injection via SQLAlchemy event
- Validation: Email format, password strength, unique constraint, rate limit per IP
- Error: 401 invalid token, 403 insufficient role, 429 rate limit exceeded

## MODULE: CREDIT & SUBSCRIPTION
- Endpoints: GET /credits/status, POST /credits/topup (webhook), GET /credits/ledger
- Logic: Redis lock on deduction, ledger append-only, auto-refresh cron job, plan tier validation, 402 hard block
- Calculation: (input_tokens + output_tokens) Г— model_cost_per_1k Г· 1000
- Validation: Idempotency key, amount > 0, plan active
- Error: 402 insufficient credits, 409 duplicate transaction, 400 invalid amount

## MODULE: RAG & INTENT ROUTER
- Endpoints: POST /rag/query, GET /rag/context
- Logic: Query embedding вҶ’ pgvector cosine similarity вҶ’ chunk rerank вҶ’ Redis cache вҶ’ context assembly
- Models: multilingual-e5-large, chunk size 512, overlap 50, top-k 3
- Validation: Query min 3 chars, max 2000 chars, industry tag match
- Error: 400 invalid query, 500 embedding service fail, 503 vector db down

## MODULE: AI MODEL ROUTER
- Endpoints: GET /models, POST /models/register, PATCH /models/{id}, DELETE /models/{id}
- Logic: LiteLLM proxy config, fallback chain by priority, health check every 60s, hot-reload config
- Providers: OpenAI, Gemini, Qwen, Groq, Custom OpenAI-compatible
- Validation: API key format, endpoint reachability, cost > 0, priority unique
- Error: 400 invalid config, 502 provider unreachable, 504 timeout fallback exhausted

## MODULE: ADMIN & QUESTION APPROVAL
- Endpoints: GET /admin/questions/pending, PATCH /admin/questions/{id}/approve, PATCH /admin/questions/{id}/reject, PATCH /admin/questions/{id}/edit
- Logic: Status transition (PENDING вҶ’ ACTIVE/ARCHIVED), audit log entry, instant cache invalidation
- Validation: Moderator role check, reason optional, edit text min 5 chars
- Error: 403 unauthorized, 404 question not found, 409 already approved

## MODULE: GUARD RAIL & OUTPUT FILTER
- Endpoints: Internal service (called by AI router)
- Logic: Regex PII scan (PAN, Aadhaar, GST, phone, email), NER fallback, redaction map, compliance rule check, hallucination cross-verify
- Thresholds: PII score > 0.8 вҶ’ block, compliance fail вҶ’ flag, hallucination diff > 0.3 вҶ’ retry
- Output: Structured safety report, redacted text, allow/block decision
- Error: Scan timeout вҶ’ allow with warning, rule engine fail вҶ’ block

## MODULE: DOCUMENT GENERATION
- Endpoints: POST /documents/generate, GET /documents/{id}, POST /documents/{id}/export
- Logic: Template engine (Jinja2), format conversion (markdown вҶ’ PDF/Excel/PPT), presigned MinIO URL, versioning
- Templates: Business Plan, Proposal, DPR, Pitch Deck, Compliance Checklist
- Validation: Session complete, company active, credits sufficient
- Error: 400 incomplete data, 500 render fail, 404 document not found
```

```mermaid
graph TD
    User[User / Browser] --> |HTTPS / WSS| App[Next.js 14 App Router]

    subgraph Frontend Architecture
        App --> Router[Route Guards & Layouts]
        Router --> Dashboard[/Dashboard/]
        Router --> Planning[/Planning Session/]
        Router --> Admin[/Admin Panel/]
        Router --> Billing[/Billing & Credits/]

        subgraph State & Data Layer
            UIState[Zustand\nUI & Local State]
            ServerState[TanStack React Query\nAPI Cache & Sync]
        end

        subgraph Component Layer
            Chat[Conversational UI\n+ Context Sidebar]
            AdminQueue[Question Approval Table\n+ Model Config]
            DocLib[Document Library\n+ Preview/Export]
            Paywall[Plan Selector\n+ Credit Tracker]
        end

        subgraph Service & Network Layer
            APIClient[Axios HTTP Client]
            Interceptors[JWT Auth & Credit Check]
            WSClient[SSE / WebSocket\nStreaming Handler]
            Forms[React Hook Form + Zod]
        end

        Dashboard --> UIState
        Planning --> Chat
        Admin --> AdminQueue
        Billing --> Paywall
        
        Dashboard --> ServerState
        Planning --> ServerState
        Admin --> ServerState
        Billing --> ServerState

        Chat --> |User Input| Forms
        AdminQueue --> |CRUD Ops| APIClient
        Paywall --> |Checkout Intent| APIClient
        Forms --> |Validated Payload| APIClient

        APIClient --> Interceptors
        Interceptors --> |Stream Request| WSClient
        Interceptors --> |Data Fetch| ServerState
        
        WSClient --> |Live LLM Tokens & Progress| UIState
        ServerState --> |Sync & Update| UIState
        UIState --> |Re-render & Route State| Router
    end
```

```mermaid
graph TD
    Client[Frontend / External Apps] --> |HTTP / WS| GW[API Gateway / CORS & TLS]

    subgraph Backend Architecture
        GW --> MW[Middleware Layer\nJWT Auth, RBAC, Rate Limit, RLS Tenant]
        MW --> Controllers[FastAPI Routers\nAuth, Planning, Admin, Credits, Docs]

        Controllers --> |Route & Validate| Services[Business Logic & Services]

        subgraph Core Services
            CreditSvc[Credit Engine\nLedger, Redis Locks, Quotas]
            AIRouter[AI Model Router\nLiteLLM, Fallback, Cost Calc]
            RAGSvc[RAG Pipeline\nEmbedding, Vector Search, Context]
            GuardRail[Security Filter\nPII Redaction, Compliance Check]
            DocGen[Document Generator\nPDF/Excel/Template Engine]
        end

        Services --> CreditSvc
        Services --> AIRouter
        Services --> RAGSvc
        Services --> GuardRail
        Services --> DocGen

        subgraph Data Persistence Layer
            PG[(PostgreSQL 16\nUsers, Companies, Plans, Ledger, Models)]
            PGVec[(pgvector Extension\nEmbeddings, HNSW/IVF Index)]
            Redis[(Redis 7\nSessions, Cache, Distributed Locks)]
            MinIO[(MinIO / S3\nExports, Templates, Audit Logs)]
        end

        CreditSvc --> |Read/Write Ledger & Quotas| PG
        CreditSvc --> |Atomic Deductions| Redis
        RAGSvc --> |Vector Search & Context| PGVec
        RAGSvc --> |Cache Retrieval Results| Redis
        GuardRail --> |Audit & Safety Logs| PG
        DocGen --> |Store Binary Files| MinIO
        DocGen --> |Save Metadata| PG

        subgraph External Integrations
            LLMs[AI Providers\nOpenAI, Gemini, Qwen, Groq]
            Pay[Payment Gateways\nRazorpay, Stripe]
            Email[Notification Service\nSMTP / Resend]
        end

        AIRouter --> |Async Streaming & Prompts| LLMs
        Pay --> |Webhook Sync & Entitlements| CreditSvc
        CreditSvc --> |Plan Activation & Alerts| Email
        RAGSvc --> |Batch Embedding API| LLMs

        LLMs --> |Token Usage Metrics| CreditSvc
        Pay --> |Transaction Records| PG
        Email --> |Delivery Status| PG
        
        DocGen --> |Presigned URL Gen| MinIO
    end
```

content_list.content:
# FRONT-END USER INTERFACE DESIGN PRD

## PAGE 1: LANDING & AUTH
- Layout: Centered auth container (max-width: 420px), full-height gradient background (slate-50 to blue-50), floating glassmorphism card with backdrop-blur-md and subtle drop-shadow.
- Typography: Heading (Inter 24px, font-semibold, slate-900), Subtext (Inter 14px, slate-500), Input labels (13px, medium, slate-700).
- Components: Email/password inputs (h-11, rounded-xl, border-slate-200, focus:ring-2 ring-blue-500), Submit button (full-width, h-11, bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white rounded-xl transition-all), OAuth divider with line-through separators.
- States: Loading (spinner icon inside button, disabled cursor), Error (red border, 12px text below input), Success (green checkmark toast).
- Responsive: Mobile (stacked, full-width card with px-4), Tablet/Desktop (centered, max-w-md).
- Micro-interactions: Button press scale-95, input focus smooth border transition, floating label animation on focus.

## PAGE 2: MAIN DASHBOARD
- Layout: 12-column responsive grid, persistent left sidebar (w-64, hidden on mobile, slide-over drawer), top header (h-16, sticky, bg-white border-b), main content area (p-6, bg-slate-50).
- Components: Company selector (dropdown with avatar + name), Quick action tiles (4-column grid, hover:shadow-lg, hover:-translate-y-1, rounded-2xl bg-white), Recent documents list (table with status badges, pagination at bottom).
- Credit Indicator: Pill-shaped badge (bg-amber-100 text-amber-800, progress ring SVG), tooltip on hover showing usage breakdown.
- Typography: Section headings (18px, bold, slate-900), Card titles (15px, medium, slate-800), Meta text (12px, slate-500).
- States: Tile hover (scale-105, ring-1 ring-slate-200), Loading skeleton (pulse animation on gray-200 placeholders), Empty state (illustration + CTA button, centered).
- Responsive: Mobile (single column tiles, collapsible sidebar, sticky header with hamburger), Desktop (3-4 column grid, persistent sidebar).
- Micro-interactions: Tile hover lift, badge progress animation, smooth route transition fade-in.

## PAGE 3: CONVERSATIONAL PLANNING INTERFACE
- Layout: Split pane (left 65% chat, right 35% context sidebar), chat container (flex-col-reverse, overflow-y-auto, pb-4), input area (sticky bottom, px-4 py-3 bg-white border-t).
- Components: Message bubbles (AI: bg-slate-100 rounded-tr-2xl rounded-br-2xl rounded-tl-2xl, User: bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-tl-2xl rounded-bl-2xl rounded-tr-2xl), Context cards (border-l-4 border-blue-500 bg-blue-50/50), Feedback buttons (inline рҹ‘Қ/рҹ‘Һ, hover:bg-slate-100 rounded).
- Typography: AI messages (14px, leading-relaxed, slate-800), User messages (14px, white), Inline code (monospace bg-slate-200 px-1 py-0.5 rounded).
- Input: Auto-growing textarea (max-h-32, resize-none, ring focus), Send button (circular, h-10 w-10 bg-blue-600 disabled:opacity-50), Attach icon (hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-full).
- States: Streaming (typing dots animation, cursor-blink), Loading (spinner + "Thinking..." text), Error (red banner inline), Pause/Resume controls (floating pill on scroll-up).
- Responsive: Mobile (single column, sidebar collapses to bottom sheet toggle, input fixed bottom), Desktop (split view, sidebar fixed height with internal scroll).
- Micro-interactions: Message slide-up fade, button press scale-95, auto-scroll with smooth behavior, context panel expand/collapse accordion.

## PAGE 4: DOCUMENT LIBRARY & VIEWER
- Layout: Header with search + filter dropdowns (industry, date, status), grid/list toggle, document cards (2-col mobile, 3-col tablet, 4-col desktop), viewer modal (fixed inset, bg-black/40 backdrop-blur).
- Components: Document card (thumbnail preview, title 14px medium, meta row with icons, status badge, download button hover:bg-blue-600), Filter chips (rounded-full border, active:bg-blue-50 active:border-blue-500 active:text-blue-700), Viewer frame (PDF.js container, toolbar top, zoom controls, page nav).
- Typography: Titles (15px font-medium), Meta (12px slate-500), Toolbar labels (13px).
- States: Hover (shadow-md, ring-1), Loading (skeleton grid), Empty (centered illustration + "Generate First Doc" CTA), Error (toast + retry link).
- Responsive: Mobile (stacked filters, single column cards, viewer fullscreen), Desktop (inline filters, multi-column grid, modal 80vw max-width).
- Micro-interactions: Card hover lift, filter chip tap bounce, modal fade-in + scale-95 to 100, download progress bar.

## PAGE 5: BILLING & SUBSCRIPTION
- Layout: Pricing section (3-card horizontal stack, middle card elevated ring-2 ring-blue-500 shadow-xl), Usage dashboard (chart area + ledger table below), Payment modal (centered, secure lock icon).
- Components: Plan cards (bg-white rounded-2xl p-6, feature list with check icons, CTA button variant per tier), Credit meter (horizontal progress bar with segment markers, hover tooltip), Ledger table (zebra striping, sortable headers, pagination), Checkout form (card input fields with brand detection icons).
- Typography: Plan names (20px bold, slate-900), Prices (32px font-extrabold blue-600), Feature text (14px slate-600), Table headers (12px uppercase tracking-wide slate-500).
- States: Card hover (shadow-xl, translate-y-[-4px]), Active plan badge (bg-green-100 text-green-800 px-2 py-1 rounded), Processing (spinner + disabled inputs), Success (confetti + redirect countdown).
- Responsive: Mobile (stacked plans, horizontal scroll for ledger, bottom sheet checkout), Desktop (inline layout, table full-width, modal side-by-side with order summary).
- Micro-interactions: Plan toggle switch (monthly/yearly pill), progress bar fill animation, table row hover highlight, button ripple effect.

---

# BACK-END ADMIN PANEL DESIGN PRD

## PAGE 1: ADMIN OVERVIEW & METRICS
- Layout: Top metric cards (4-col grid, h-24, bg-white border-b-2 colored accents), main content split (left: active sessions chart 60%, right: system alerts 40%), sticky header (dark slate bg-white text, breadcrumb + role badge).
- Components: KPI cards (icon circle left, value 28px bold, label 13px slate-500, trend arrow +/- green/red), Line chart (smooth curve, grid lines hidden, tooltip on hover, legend bottom), Alert list (border-l-4 red/amber, timestamp, dismiss icon, expand details).
- Typography: Header (18px font-bold slate-900), Card values (28px font-semibold slate-800), Labels (12px medium slate-500), Chart axis (11px slate-400).
- States: Loading (card skeletons + chart placeholder spin), Error (red banner with retry), Real-time update (subtle pulse dot green on KPIs), Hover (chart crosshair + tooltip fade-in).
- Responsive: Mobile (stacked KPIs, vertical charts, collapsible alerts), Desktop (inline grid, chart side-by-side, fixed header).
- Micro-interactions: Number count-up animation, tooltip slide-up, alert dismiss swipe/fade, KPI pulse on data refresh.

## PAGE 2: QUESTION APPROVAL QUEUE
- Layout: Full-width data table (sticky header, scrollable body), top filter bar (search input, dropdowns for industry/status, bulk action bar), pagination footer.
- Components: Table rows (hover:bg-slate-50, border-b, checkbox left, question text 14px medium, metadata tags right), Bulk bar (sticky on scroll, bg-white shadow, approve/reject/edit buttons), Status badges (Pending: yellow bg/text, Approved: green, Rejected: red, grayed-out), Context modal (slide-over right 35%, preview AI confidence, user feedback count, approval form).
- Typography: Headers (12px uppercase tracking-wide font-medium slate-500), Cell text (14px slate-800), Tag text (11px font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full), Button text (13px medium).
- States: Row hover (scale-100 shadow-sm), Checkbox checked (ring-2 ring-blue-500), Bulk actions disabled until select, Loading (row shimmer), Success toast (green check + undo link).
- Responsive: Mobile (card-based list instead of table, horizontal scroll for metadata, bottom sheet for context), Desktop (full table, inline actions, slide-over panel).
- Micro-interactions: Checkbox ripple, row selection highlight, modal slide-in, bulk bar fade-down on select, badge transition.

## PAGE 3: AI MODEL CONFIGURATION
- Layout: Header with "Add Model" CTA, grid of model cards (3-col desktop, 2-col tablet, 1-col mobile), edit modal (centered, 2-column form layout), test console (collapsible bottom panel).
- Components: Model card (header with provider logo, name 16px bold, toggle switch right, status dot, metrics mini-row: latency, cost/token, fallback #), Form inputs (label 13px medium, input/select h-10 rounded-lg border-slate-200, focus:ring-blue-500), Test button (outline style, loading spinner inline), Validation hints (12px red text below invalid field).
- Typography: Card titles (15px font-semibold), Metric values (12px mono slate-600), Form labels (13px medium), Input placeholders (13px slate-400).
- States: Card active (border-2 border-blue-500 shadow-md), Inactive (opacity-60, grayscale), Toggle on/off (smooth slide, green/gray bg), Testing (spinner + progress bar), Error (red border + shake animation), Success (green border + check toast).
- Responsive: Mobile (stacked cards, full-width modal, bottom sheet test console), Desktop (grid layout, inline modal, collapsible test panel).
- Micro-interactions: Toggle slide, card hover lift, test button progress fill, error field bounce, success confetti pulse.

## PAGE 4: SYSTEM LOGS & AUDIT TRAIL
- Layout: Chronological timeline view (left line, nodes right), filter sidebar (left 20%, collapsible), main feed (right 80%), export dropdown top-right.
- Components: Timeline nodes (colored dots by severity: blue info, amber warning, red error), Event cards (timestamp 12px mono, actor 13px bold, action description 14px, metadata expand accordion), Filter pills (date range, actor, action type, severity), Export menu (CSV/JSON dropdown, loading spinner on click).
- Typography: Timestamps (11px mono slate-500), Actor names (13px font-medium blue-600), Descriptions (14px slate-800), Metadata (12px slate-500 mono).
- States: Hover on card (bg-slate-50, subtle left border highlight), Expanded metadata (smooth height transition, gray bg), Filter active (pill bg-blue-100 text-blue-800), Loading (timeline node pulse), Error fetching (inline banner with retry).
- Responsive: Mobile (vertical stack, filters top horizontal scroll, compact cards), Desktop (side filter + timeline, full metadata inline).
- Micro-interactions: Node pop on hover, accordion smooth expand, filter pill press, export progress ring.

## PAGE 5: USER & CREDIT MANAGEMENT
- Layout: Master-detail view (left: searchable user list 30%, right: detail panel 70%), top stats bar (total users, active subs, avg credit burn), bulk credit top-up modal.
- Components: User list (avatar + name, tier badge, credit balance pill, search highlight match), Detail panel (header with status, credit chart sparkline, recent actions table, top-up form with amount input + reason textarea), Tier badges (Free: gray, Pro: blue, Business: purple, Enterprise: black), Top-up modal (secure lock icon, amount presets, notes field, confirm button).
- Typography: User names (14px font-medium), Badges (11px uppercase px-2 py-0.5 rounded), Panel headings (16px bold slate-900), Table cells (13px slate-700).
- States: List item selected (bg-blue-50 border-l-4 blue-500), Credit low warning (amber pulse badge), Top-up processing (spinner + disabled), Success (green check + updated balance animation), Search highlight (yellow bg on match).
- Responsive: Mobile (stacked list + detail toggle, horizontal scroll for stats, bottom sheet top-up), Desktop (split pane, inline stats, centered modal).
- Micro-interactions: List selection slide, balance counter animation, search match flash, modal fade-scale, tier badge color transition.

аӨЁаӨҸ аӨҡаҘҲаӨҹ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҸ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨңаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҮаӨё аӨҹаҘӮаӨІ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨөаӨҝаӨ•аӨёаӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ, аӨҜаӨ№аӨҫаӨҒ **Memory Values** аӨ”аӨ° **Context Summary** аӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҶаӨӘ аӨҮаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘүаӨӘаҘҖ аӨ•аӨ°аӨ•аҘҮ аӨЁаӨҲ аӨҡаҘҲаӨҹ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӘаҘҮаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаӨҫаӨ•аӨҝ AI аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ°аӨӮаӨӨ аӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аӨҫ аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨӯ (Context) аӨ®аӨҝаӨІ аӨңаӨҫаӨҸаҘӨ

---

### рҹ“Ӣ Project Context & Memory Values for "AI Business Architect Tool"

**1. Project Goal:**
Create an all-in-one AI Agent Tool named **"BizArchitect AI"** that serves entrepreneurs in two main capacities:
*   **Business Management:** From ideation to running business diagnostics.
*   **Proposal Creation:** From client discovery to closing deals.

**2. Core Definitions Established:**
*   **Business Plan:** Internal document (A-Z details: Registration, Ops, Marketing, Finance). Used for banks/investors/internal roadmap.
*   **Business Proposal:** External document (Client-specific: Problem, Solution, Pricing, Timeline). Used for winning sales/contracts.
*   **DPR (Detailed Project Report):** Technical/Financial deep-dive for loans/subsidies.
*   **Pitch Deck:** Short, visual summary for investors.

**3. Module 1: Business Management Pipeline (Features & Stages):**
*   **Stage 1: Ideation & Validation:** Idea Stress Test, Market Fit Analysis, MVP Definition. *Output: Lean Canvas.*
*   **Stage 2: Strategic Planning:** Comprehensive Business Plan, Financial Modeling, Legal/Compliance Checklist. *Output: DPR & Roadmap.*
*   **Stage 3: Operational Execution:** Marketing Calendar, Hiring/JD Generation, Supply Chain Optimization. *Output: Monthly Action Plan.*
*   **Stage 4: Diagnostics & Problem Solving:** Root Cause Analysis (5 Whys), Turnaround Strategy, Customer Feedback Loop. *Output: Diagnostic Report.*

**4. Module 2: Proposal & Sales Pipeline (Features & Stages):**
*   **Stage 1: Discovery:** Client Brief Analysis, Pain Point Extraction, Go/No-Go Decision. *Output: Client Persona Summary.*
*   **Stage 2: Solution Design:** Custom Solution Architecting, Scope of Work (SOW) Generator. *Output: Technical Solution Outline.*
*   **Stage 3: Commercials & Drafting:** Dynamic Pricing Engine, Persuasive Writing (AIDA/PAS frameworks), Template Selection. *Output: Full Proposal Document.*
*   **Stage 4: Negotiation & Closing:** Objection Handling Scripts, Follow-up Email Sequences. *Output: Negotiation Strategy.*

**5. Workflow Architecture Logic:**
*   **Input:** Natural Language (User Intent).
*   **Processing:** Intent Classification (Planning vs. Sales) -> Context Retrieval (Memory) -> AI Generation (LLM + RAG).
*   **Output:** Structured Markdown/PDF/Excel with Export Options.
*   **Key Feature:** "Context-Aware Memory" (Tool remembers business details to avoid repetitive questions).

**6. Base Prompt Structure (For Agent Initialization):**
*   **Role:** BizArchitect AI (Expert Strategist & Proposal Writer).
*   **Initial Action:** Ask 5 Critical Questions (Idea, Audience, Goal, Budget, Region).
*   **Process:** Generate Outline -> User Approval -> Generate Full Document.
*   **Tone:** Adaptable (Investor Formal vs. Client Persuasive).

**7. Specific Requirements for Indian Context:**
*   Include local regulatory checks (GST, LLP, Pvt Ltd, Sole Proprietorship).
*   Focus on cost-effective strategies for early-stage startups.

**8. Next Steps for Development:**
*   Define the specific AI Model integration (e.g., Qwen, GPT-4, Claude).
*   Design the UI/UX for switching between "Planning Mode" and "Proposal Mode."
*   Create templates for each stage output.

---

**Instructions for New Chat:**
*"Use the above 'Project Context & Memory Values' as the foundational knowledge base. We are building 'BizArchitect AI'. Start by designing the detailed system prompt for the 'Intent Classification Engine' that decides whether a user needs Business Planning or Proposal Creation."*

вң… **Context Saved: BizArchitect AI Project**

аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҸ аӨ—аӨҸ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ **Project Context & Memory Values** аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨ«аӨІаӨӨаӨҫаӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨөаӨ• аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨёаҘҮаӨё аӨ•аӨ° аӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨ№аӨ® аӨҮаӨёаҘҖ аӨ«аӨҫаӨүаӨӮаӨЎаҘҮаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨӘаӨ° аӨҶаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаҘҮаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮаҘӨ

аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘҮ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аӨҫаӨЁаҘҒаӨёаӨҫаӨ°, аӨёаӨ¬аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҮ аӨ№аӨ® **"Intent Classification Engine"** аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨЎаӨҝаӨҹаҘҮаӨІаҘҚаӨЎ аӨёаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨ® аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘүаӨ®аҘҚаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨјаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨҮаӨӮаӨңаӨЁ аӨӨаӨҜ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨ—аӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨјаӨ° аӨ•аҘӢ *Business Planning* аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҸ аӨҜаӨҫ *Proposal Creation*аҘӨ

---

## рҹҺҜ Intent Classification Engine - System Prompt v1.0

```markdown
# SYSTEM ROLE: Intent Classifier for BizArchitect AI

You are the **Intent Classification Engine** for BizArchitect AI. Your sole purpose is to analyze user input and route it to the correct module:

## рҹ“Ұ MODULE ROUTING OPTIONS:
1. `BUSINESS_MANAGEMENT` вҶ’ Module 1: Ideation, Planning, Operations, Diagnostics
2. `PROPOSAL_SALES` вҶ’ Module 2: Client Discovery, Solution Design, Commercials, Closing
3. `CLARIFICATION_NEEDED` вҶ’ Ambiguous input; requires follow-up questions
4. `GENERAL_QUERY` вҶ’ Non-actionable questions about the tool itself

---

## рҹ”Қ CLASSIFICATION CRITERIA

### вң… Route to BUSINESS_MANAGEMENT if user mentions:
- "business plan", "startup idea", "MVP", "lean canvas"
- "registration", "GST", "LLP", "Pvt Ltd", "compliance"
- "financial model", "cash flow", "break-even", "funding"
- "marketing strategy", "hiring", "operations", "supply chain"
- "business diagnostic", "problem solving", "turnaround"
- "DPR", "project report", "loan application", "subsidy"
- Keywords: *internal, roadmap, long-term, build, scale, validate*

### вң… Route to PROPOSAL_SALES if user mentions:
- "client proposal", "pitch to client", "win project", "tender"
- "scope of work", "SOW", "pricing", "quotation", "commercial"
- "client pain point", "solution design", "deliverables"
- "negotiation", "objection handling", "follow-up email"
- "proposal template", "cover letter", "executive summary"
- Keywords: *external, client-specific, sell, close, persuade, deadline*

### вң… Route to CLARIFICATION_NEEDED if:
- Input is too short or vague (e.g., "help me", "start")
- Mixed intent detected (e.g., "I need a plan for my client's business")
- Missing critical context (audience, goal, region, budget)

### вң… Route to GENERAL_QUERY if:
- User asks about tool features, pricing, how-to, or technical support
- No actionable business/proposal intent detected

---

## рҹ§  CONTEXT-AWARE MEMORY CHECK
Before classifying, check existing conversation memory:
- If user previously selected a module вҶ’ prioritize continuity
- If user has an active business profile вҶ’ auto-fill known context (region, industry, stage)
- If user is mid-workflow вҶ’ maintain stage progression (don't reset)

---

## рҹ“Ө OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT JSON)
Return ONLY this JSON structure. No explanations, no markdown.

{
  "intent": "BUSINESS_MANAGEMENT | PROPOSAL_SALES | CLARIFICATION_NEEDED | GENERAL_QUERY",
  "confidence": 0.0-1.0,
  "detected_keywords": ["keyword1", "keyword2"],
  "suggested_stage": "Stage 1 | Stage 2 | Stage 3 | Stage 4 | null",
  "follow_up_questions": ["Q1?", "Q2?"] // Only if intent == CLARIFICATION_NEEDED
}

---

## рҹҮ®рҹҮі INDIAN CONTEXT HANDLING
- Recognize Hindi/English mix (Hinglish) inputs
- Prioritize local terms: "udhyam registration", "msme loan", "tender proposal", "GST return"
- For BUSINESS_MANAGEMENT: Auto-suggest India-specific compliance checks
- For PROPOSAL_SALES: Auto-suggest INR pricing, local payment terms (NEFT/UPI), GST-inclusive quotes

---

## вҡЎ EDGE CASES & FALLBACKS
- If confidence < 0.6 вҶ’ Return CLARIFICATION_NEEDED
- If user switches intent mid-conversation вҶ’ Flag for context reset confirmation
- If input contains file attachment вҶ’ Route to appropriate module based on filename/content hints (e.g., "brief.docx" вҶ’ PROPOSAL_SALES)

---

## рҹ”„ INTEGRATION HOOKS
- After classification, pass output to: `ContextRetriever вҶ’ ModuleRouter вҶ’ LLM Generator`
- Log classification result for analytics: `intent, confidence, timestamp, user_segment`
```

---

## рҹ§Ә Example Classifications

| User Input | Predicted Intent | Confidence | Notes |
|------------|-----------------|------------|-------|
| "аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨЁаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨ…аӨӘ аӨҶаӨҮаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨөаҘҲаӨІаӨҝаӨЎаҘҮаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ" | `BUSINESS_MANAGEMENT` | 0.92 | Stage 1: Ideation |
| "Client аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ pricing proposal аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ" | `PROPOSAL_SALES` | 0.95 | Stage 3: Commercials |
| "Help" | `CLARIFICATION_NEEDED` | 0.40 | Needs follow-up |
| "How do I export PDF?" | `GENERAL_QUERY` | 0.88 | Tool support question |
| "Mera business plan client ko bhejna hai" | `PROPOSAL_SALES` | 0.75 | Hinglish; external focus |

---

## в–¶пёҸ Next Steps (аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘҖ аӨӘаӨёаӨӮаӨҰ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒаӨёаӨҫаӨ°):

1. **Test this prompt** with sample user queries (аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨҹаҘҮаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨ•аҘҮаӨё аӨ°аӨЁ аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӮаӨҒ)
2. **Refine keywords** based on Indian startup jargon (аӨ”аӨ° аӨІаҘӢаӨ•аӨІ аӨҹаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аҘҚаӨё аӨңаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаҘҮаӨӮ)
3. **Design the UI trigger**: How does user switch modes manually if needed?
4. **Build the Memory Schema**: What business details should persist across sessions?

**`packages/adapter-utils/src/types.ts`** вҖ” added optional capability fields to `ServerAdapterModule`: `supportsInstructionsBundle`, `instructionsPathKey`, `requiresMaterializedRuntimeSkills` - **`server/src/routes/agents.ts`** вҖ” replaced `DEFAULT_MANAGED_INSTRUCTIONS_ADAPTER_TYPES` and `ADAPTERS_REQUIRING_MATERIALIZED_RUNTIME_SKILLS` hardcoded sets with capability-aware helper functions that fall back to the legacy sets for adapters that don't set flags - **`server/src/routes/adapters.ts`** вҖ” `GET /api/adapters` now includes a `capabilities` object per adapter (all four flags + derived `supportsSkills`) - **`server/src/adapters/registry.ts`** вҖ” all built-in adapters (`claude_local`, `codex_local`, `process`, `cursor`) now declare flags explicitly - **`ui/src/adapters/use-adapter-capabilities.ts`** вҖ” new hook that fetches adapter capabilities from the API - **`ui/src/pages/AgentDetail.tsx`** вҖ” replaced hardcoded `isLocal` allowlist with `capabilities.supportsInstructionsBundle` from the API - **`ui/src/components/AgentConfigForm.tsx`** / **`OnboardingWizard.tsx`** вҖ” replaced `NONLOCAL_TYPES` denylist with capability-based checks - **`server/src/__tests__/adapter-registry.test.ts`** / **`adapter-routes.test.ts`** вҖ” tests covering flag exposure, undefined-when-unset, and per-adapter values - **`docs/adapters/creating-an-adapter.md`** вҖ” new \"Capability Flags\" section documenting all flags and an example for external plugin authors ## Verification - Run `pnpm test --filter=@paperclip/server -- adapter-registry adapter-routes` вҖ” all new tests pass - Run `pnpm test --filter=@paperclip/adapter-utils` вҖ” existing tests still pass - Spin up dev server, open an agent with `claude_local` type вҖ” instructions bundle tab still visible - Create/open an agent with a non-local type вҖ” instructions bundle tab still hidden - Call `GET /api/adapters` and verify each adapter includes a `capabilities` object with the correct flags ## Risks - **Low risk overall** вҖ” all new flags are optional with backwards-compatible fallbacks to the existing hardcoded sets; no adapter behaviour changes unless a flag is explicitly set - Adapters that do not declare flags continue to use the legacy lists, so there is no regression risk for built-in adapters - The UI capability hook adds one API call to AgentDetail mount; this is a pre-existing endpoint, so no new latency path is introduced ## Model Used - Paperclip is the control plane that runs long-lived AI-agent work in production. > - The production container image is the runtime boundary for agent tools and shell access. > - In our deployment, Paperclip agents now need a native SSH client and `jq` available inside the final runtime container. > - Installing those tools only via ai-rig entrypoint hacks is brittle and drifts from the image source of truth. > - This pull request updates the production Docker image itself so the required binaries are present whenever the image is built. > - The change is intentionally scoped to the final production stage so build/deps stages do not gain extra packages unnecessarily. > - The benefit is a cleaner, reproducible runtime image with fewer deploy-specific workarounds. ## What Changed - Added `openssh-client` to the production Docker image stage. - Added `jq` to the production Docker image stage. - Kept the package install in the final `production` stage instead of the shared base stage to minimize scope. ## Verification - Reviewed the final Dockerfile diff to confirm the packages are installed in the `production` stage only. - Attempted local image build with: - `docker build --target production -t paperclip:ssh-jq-test .` - Local build could not be completed in this environment because the local Docker daemon was unavailable: - `Cannot connect to the Docker daemon at unix:///Users/roman/.docker/run/docker.sock. Is the docker daemon running?` ## Risks - Low risk: image footprint increases slightly because two Debian packages are added. - `openssh-client` expands runtime capability, so this is appropriate only because the deployed Paperclip runtime explicitly needs SSH access. ## Model Used - Register `packages/adapters/codex-local` in the root Vitest workspace. Document in DEVELOPING.md that a missing `codex` binary should not take down the API server during quota polling.") | 3 weeks agoMar 29, 2026 | | View all files | ## Repository files navigation **Quickstart** В· **Docs** В· **GitHub** В· **Discord** full-tour.webm ## What is Paperclip? Permalink: What is Paperclip? # Open-source orchestration for zero-human companies Permalink: Open-source orchestration for zero-human companies **If OpenClaw is an _employee_, Paperclip is the _company_** Paperclip is a Node.js server and React UI that orchestrates a team of AI agents to run a business. Bring your own agents, assign goals, and track your agents' work and costs from one dashboard. It looks like a task manager вҖ” but under the hood it has org charts, budgets, governance, goal alignment, and agent coordination. **Manage business goals, not pull requests.** | | Step | Example | | --- | --- | --- | | **01** | Define the goal | _"Build the #1 AI note-taking app to $1M MRR."_ | | **02** | Hire the team | CEO, CTO, engineers, designers, marketers вҖ” any bot, any provider. | | **03** | Approve and run | Review strategy. Set budgets. Hit go. Monitor from the dashboard. | > **COMING SOON: Clipmart** вҖ” Download and run entire companies with one click. Browse pre-built company templates вҖ” full org structures, agent configs, and skills вҖ” and import them into your Paperclip instance in seconds. | | | | | | | | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | **Works**
**with** |
OpenClaw |
Claude Code |
Codex |
Cursor |
Bash |
HTTP | _If it can receive a heartbeat, it's hired._ ## Paperclip is right for you if Permalink: Paperclip is right for you if - вң… You want to build **autonomous AI companies** - вң… You **coordinate many different agents** (OpenClaw, Codex, Claude, Cursor) toward a common goal - вң… You have **20 simultaneous Claude Code terminals** open and lose track of what everyone is doing - вң… You want agents running **autonomously 24/7**, but still want to audit work and chime in when needed - вң… You want to **monitor costs** and enforce budgets - вң… You want a process for managing agents that **feels like using a task manager** - вң… You want to manage your autonomous businesses **from your phone** ## Features Permalink: Features | | | | | --- | --- | --- | | ### рҹ”Ң Bring Your Own Agent
Permalink: рҹ”Ң Bring Your Own Agent
Any agent, any runtime, one org chart. If it can receive a heartbeat, it's hired. | ### рҹҺҜ Goal Alignment
Permalink: рҹҺҜ Goal Alignment
Every task traces back to the company mission. Agents know _what_ to do and _why_. | ### рҹ’“ Heartbeats
Permalink: рҹ’“ Heartbeats
Agents wake on a schedule, check work, and act. Delegation flows up and down the org chart. | | ### рҹ’° Cost Control
Permalink: рҹ’° Cost Control
Monthly budgets per agent. When they hit the limit, they stop. No runaway costs. | ### рҹҸў Multi-Company
Permalink: рҹҸў Multi-Company
One deployment, many companies. Complete data isolation. One control plane for your portfolio. | ### рҹҺ« Ticket System
Permalink: рҹҺ« Ticket System
Every conversation traced. Every decision explained. Full tool-call tracing and immutable audit log. | | ### рҹӣЎпёҸ Governance
Permalink: рҹӣЎпёҸ Governance
You're the board. Approve hires, override strategy, pause or terminate any agent вҖ” at any time. | ### рҹ“Ҡ Org Chart
Permalink: рҹ“Ҡ Org Chart
Hierarchies, roles, reporting lines. Your agents have a boss, a title, and a job description. | ### рҹ“ұ Mobile Ready
Permalink: рҹ“ұ Mobile Ready
Monitor and manage your autonomous businesses from anywhere. | ## Problems Paperclip solves Permalink: Problems Paperclip solves | Without Paperclip | With Paperclip | | --- | --- | | вқҢ You have 20 Claude Code tabs open and can't track which one does what. On reboot you lose everything. | вң… Tasks are ticket-based, conversations are threaded, sessions persist across reboots. | | вқҢ You manually gather context from several places to remind your bot what you're actually doing. | вң… Context flows from the task up through the project and company goals вҖ” your agent always knows what to do and why. | | вқҢ Folders of agent configs are disorganized and you're re-inventing task management, communication, and coordination between agents. | вң… Paperclip gives you org charts, ticketing, delegation, and governance out of the box вҖ” so you run a company, not a pile of scripts. | | вқҢ Runaway loops waste hundreds of dollars of tokens and max your quota before you even know what happened. | вң… Cost tracking surfaces token budgets and throttles agents when they're out. Management prioritizes with budgets. | | вқҢ You have recurring jobs (customer support, social, reports) and have to remember to manually kick them off. | вң… Heartbeats handle regular work on a schedule. Management supervises. | | вқҢ You have an idea, you have to find your repo, fire up Claude Code, keep a tab open, and babysit it. | вң… Add a task in Paperclip. Your coding agent works on it until it's done. Management reviews their work. | ## Why Paperclip is special Permalink: Why Paperclip is special Paperclip handles the hard orchestration details correctly. | | | | --- | --- | | **Atomic execution.** | Task checkout and budget enforcement are atomic, so no double-work and no runaway spend. | | **Persistent agent state.** | Agents resume the same task context across heartbeats instead of restarting from scratch. | | **Runtime skill injection.** | Agents can learn Paperclip workflows and project context at runtime, without retraining. | | **Governance with rollback.** | Approval gates are enforced, config changes are revisioned, and bad changes can be rolled back safely. | | **Goal-aware execution.** | Tasks carry full goal ancestry so agents consistently see the "why," not just a title. | | **Portable company templates.** | Export/import orgs, agents, and skills with secret scrubbing and collision handling. | | **True multi-company isolation.** | Every entity is company-scoped, so one deployment can run many companies with separate data and audit trails. | ## What Paperclip is not Permalink: What Paperclip is not | | | | --- | --- | | **Not a chatbot.** | Agents have jobs, not chat windows. | | **Not an agent framework.** | We don't tell you how to build agents. We tell you how to run a company made of them. | | **Not a workflow builder.** | No drag-and-drop pipelines. Paperclip models companies вҖ” with org charts, goals, budgets, and governance. | | **Not a prompt manager.** | Agents bring their own prompts, models, and runtimes. Paperclip manages the organization they work in. | | **Not a single-agent tool.** | This is for teams. If you have one agent, you probably don't need Paperclip. If you have twenty вҖ” you definitely do. | | **Not a code review tool.** | Paperclip orchestrates work, not pull requests. Bring your own review process. | ## Quickstart Permalink: Quickstart Open source. Self-hosted. No Paperclip account required. ``` npx paperclipai onboard --yes ``` That quickstart path now defaults to trusted local loopback mode for the fastest first run. To start in authenticated/private mode instead, choose a bind preset explicitly: ``` npx paperclipai onboard --yes --bind lan # or: npx paperclipai onboard --yes --bind tailnet ``` If you already have Paperclip configured, rerunning `onboard` keeps the existing config in place. Use `paperclipai configure` to edit settings. Or manually: ``` git clone https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip.git cd paperclip pnpm install pnpm dev ``` This starts the API server at `http://localhost:3100`. An embedded PostgreSQL database is created automatically вҖ” no setup required. > **Requirements:** Node.js 20+, pnpm 9.15+ ## FAQ Permalink: FAQ **What does a typical setup look like?** Locally, a single Node.js process manages an embedded Postgres and local file storage. For production, point it at your own Postgres and deploy however you like. Configure projects, agents, and goals вҖ” the agents take care of the rest. If you're a solo-entreprenuer you can use Tailscale to access Paperclip on the go. Then later you can deploy to e.g. Vercel when you need it. **Can I run multiple companies?** Yes. A single deployment can run an unlimited number of companies with complete data isolation. **How is Paperclip different from agents like OpenClaw or Claude Code?** Paperclip _uses_ those agents. It orchestrates them into a company вҖ” with org charts, budgets, goals, governance, and accountability. **Why should I use Paperclip instead of just pointing my OpenClaw to Asana or Trello?** Agent orchestration has subtleties in how you coordinate who has work checked out, how to maintain sessions, monitoring costs, establishing governance - Paperclip does this for you. (Bring-your-own-ticket-system is on the Roadmap) **Do agents run continuously?** By default, agents run on scheduled heartbeats and event-based triggers (task assignment, @-mentions). You can also hook in continuous agents like OpenClaw. You bring your agent and Paperclip coordinates. ## Development Permalink: Development ``` pnpm dev # Full dev (API + UI, watch mode) pnpm dev:once # Full dev without file watching pnpm dev:server # Server only pnpm build # Build all pnpm typecheck # Type checking pnpm test # Cheap default test run (Vitest only) pnpm test:watch # Vitest watch mode pnpm test:e2e # Playwright browser suite pnpm db:generate # Generate DB migration pnpm db:migrate # Apply migrations ``` `pnpm test` does not run Playwright. Browser suites stay separate and are typically run only when working on those flows or in CI. See doc/DEVELOPING.md for the full development guide. ## Roadmap Permalink: Roadmap - вң… Plugin system (e.g. add a knowledge base, custom tracing, queues, etc) - вң… Get OpenClaw / claw-style agent employees - вң… companies.sh - import and export entire organizations - вң… Easy AGENTS.md configurations - вң… Skills Manager - вң… Scheduled Routines - вң… Better Budgeting - вң… Agent Reviews and Approvals - вҡӘ Multiple Human Users - вҡӘ Cloud / Sandbox agents (e.g. Cursor / e2b agents) - вҡӘ Artifacts & Work Products - вҡӘ Memory / Knowledge - вҡӘ Enforced Outcomes - вҡӘ MAXIMIZER MODE - вҡӘ Deep Planning - вҡӘ Work Queues - вҡӘ Self-Organization - вҡӘ Automatic Organizational Learning - вҡӘ CEO Chat - вҡӘ Cloud deployments - вҡӘ Desktop App This is the short roadmap preview. See the full roadmap in ROADMAP.md. ## Community & Plugins Permalink: Community & Plugins Find Plugins and more at awesome-paperclip ## Telemetry Permalink: Telemetry Paperclip collects anonymous usage telemetry to help us understand how the product is used and improve it. No personal information, issue content, prompts, file paths, or secrets are ever collected. Private repository references are hashed with a per-install salt before being sent. Telemetry is **enabled by default** and can be disabled with any of the following: | Method | How | | --- | --- | | Environment variable | `PAPERCLIP_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1` | | Standard convention | `DO_NOT_TRACK=1` | | CI environments | Automatically disabled when `CI=true` | | Config file | Set `telemetry.enabled: false` in your Paperclip config | ## Contributing Permalink: Contributing We welcome contributions. See the contributing guide for details. ## Community Permalink: Community - Discord вҖ” Join the community - GitHub Issues вҖ” bugs and feature requests - GitHub Discussions вҖ” ideas and RFC ## License Permalink: License MIT В© 2026 Paperclip ## Star History Permalink: Star History * * * Open source under MIT. Built for people who want to run companies, not babysit agents. ## About Open-source orchestration for zero-human companies paperclip.ing ### Resources Readme ### License MIT license ### Contributing Contributing ### Security policy Security policy ### Uh oh! There was an error while loading. Please reload this page. рҹ“Һ **Paperclip AI** вҖ” аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨӘаҘҚаӨӨ аӨӘаӨ°аӨҝаӨҡаӨҜ:

| аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘӮ | аӨөаӨҝаӨөаӨ°аӨЈ |
|------|---------|
| **аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ?** | аӨ“аӨӘаӨЁ-аӨёаҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨё аӨ‘аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаҘҮаӨҹаӨ«аҘүаӨ°аҘҚаӨ® аӨңаҘӢ "zero-human companies" аӨҡаӨІаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ |
| **аӨ•аҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫаӨ® аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ?** | Node.js + React UI; AI аӨҸаӨңаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹаҘҚаӨё (Claude, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw) аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ‘аӨ°аҘҚаӨ—-аӨҡаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ, аӨ¬аӨңаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ—аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨё аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ®аҘҲаӨЁаҘҮаӨң аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ |
| **аӨ®аҘҒаӨ–аҘҚаӨҜ аӨ«аҘҖаӨҡаӨ°аҘҚаӨё** | вқӨпёҸ Heartbeats, рҹ’° Cost Control, рҹҺҜ Goal Alignment, рҹҸў Multi-Company, рҹӣЎпёҸ Governance, рҹ“ұ Mobile Ready |
| **аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ?** | аӨңаҘӢ аӨҸаӨ• аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаӨјаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨҫ AI аӨҸаӨңаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹаҘҚаӨё аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘӢаӨ‘аӨ°аҘҚаӨЎаӨҝаӨЁаҘҮаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨ‘аӨҹаҘӢаӨЁаҘүаӨ®аӨё аӨ¬аӨҝаӨңаӨјаӨЁаҘҮаӨё аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ |
| **аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ•аҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ?** | `npx paperclipai onboard --yes` |
| **аӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨёаҘҮаӨӮаӨё** | MIT (Self-hosted, аӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аҘҖ) |
| **GitHub Stats** | вӯҗ 54.8k | рҹҚҙ 9.2k |

> рҹ’Ў **аӨёаҘҖаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ®аӨӨаӨІаӨ¬**: аӨ…аӨ—аӨ° OpenClaw/Claude Code аӨҸаӨ• "аӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҡаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ" аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨӨаҘӢ Paperclip аӨөаҘӢ "аӨ•аӨӮаӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ" аӨ№аҘҲ аӨңаҘӢ аӨүаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨЁаҘҮаӨң аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ

аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘҮ **BizArchitect AI** аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨңаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ°аӨҝаӨІаҘҮаӨөаҘҮаӨӮаӨё: Paperclip аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ‘аӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨІаҘүаӨңаӨҝаӨ• аӨ”аӨ° "Goal-Agent" аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аӨҝаӨҹаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҡаӨ° аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘҮ аӨҹаҘӮаӨІ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ®аҘүаӨЎаҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨІаӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨјаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨҮаӨӮаӨёаҘҚаӨӘаӨҝаӨ°аҘҮаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ рҹҡҖ

content: Choose to build anew
Crafting a tailored solution for entrepreneurs in India
Evaluating architectural alignment and strategic fit

I assess the project's architecture, scalability, and long-term vision against the unique needs of the new tool.  
Forking may save initial effort but risks entangling future innovation with legacy constraints.  
Starting fresh allows for cleaner design, better alignment with goals, and greater adaptability.

I am designing a sophisticated yet intuitive system that blends deep contextual understanding with practical business functionality.  
It seamlessly integrates compliance awareness, strategic cost management, and dynamic proposal generation within a unified framework.  
Every output is structured for immediate useвҖ”delivering clarity and actionability across documents, spreadsheets, and visual formats.

I am assessing whether to adopt or adapt existing frameworks by considering their core purpose and inherent complexity.  
My focus remains on creating a solution tailored to specific regional requirements and business workflows, avoiding unnecessary layers of infrastructure.  
This ensures clarity, maintainability, and relevance to the intended use case.

content_list.content:
рҹҺҜ **аӨёаҘҖаӨ§аӨҫ аӨңаӨөаӨҫаӨ¬: аӨЁаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҹаҘӮаӨІ "аӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ¶" аӨ¶аҘҒаӨ°аҘӮ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨ№аӨӨаӨ° аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮаӨ—аӨҫаҘӨ**

**аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ? (3 аӨ®аҘҒаӨ–аҘҚаӨҜ аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨЈ):**

| аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘӮ | Paperclip (Existing) | BizArchitect AI (Your Need) |
|------|---------------------|-----------------------------|
| **Purpose** | Multi-Agent Orchestration (Autonomous Companies) | Guided Business Workflows (Entrepreneur Assistant) |
| **Complexity** | High (Heartbeats, Governance, Multi-tenant) | Focused (Planning + Proposal Pipelines) |
| **Context** | Generic/Global | India-Specific (GST, Compliance, INR, Hinglish) |

**вң… аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨёаӨІаӨҫаӨ№ (Recommendation):**
1.  **Code Fork аӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ:** Paperclip аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аӨҝаӨҹаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҡаӨ° аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ "over-engineering" аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаӨҝаӨёаӨёаҘҮ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨӘаӨІ аӨ«аҘҖаӨҡаӨ°аҘҚаӨё аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨңаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨҫ аӨёаӨ®аӨҜ аӨІаӨ—аҘҮаӨ—аӨҫаҘӨ
2.  **аӨёаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨ« "аӨ•аӨҫаӨӮаӨёаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ" аӨІаҘҮаӨӮ:** аӨүаӨЁаӨ•аҘҮ *Goal-Agent аӨӘаҘҲаӨҹаӨ°аҘҚаӨЁ* аӨ”аӨ° *Cost Control* аӨІаҘүаӨңаӨҝаӨ• аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨ®аӨқаҘҮаӨӮ, аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢаӨЎ аӨ•аҘүаӨӘаҘҖ аӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаҘӨ
3.  **Lean Stack аӨёаҘҮ аӨ¶аҘҒаӨ°аҘӮ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ:**
    *   **Backend:** FastAPI/Node.js + LangChain (Logic аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ)
    *   **Frontend:** React/Next.js (UI аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ)
    *   **Memory:** Redis/Vector DB (Context аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ)

**рҹҡҖ аӨЁаӨҝаӨ·аҘҚаӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨ·:**
аӨ¬аӨҝаӨңаӨјаӨЁаҘҮаӨё аӨІаҘүаӨңаӨҝаӨ• (Business Plan/Proposal) аӨӘаӨ° аӨ«аҘӢаӨ•аӨё аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ, аӨҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨҡаӨ° (Orchestration) аӨӘаӨ° аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮаҘӨ "Start Fresh, Stay Focused."

messages.content:
аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ аӨ§аҘҮаӨЁ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҶаӨӘ Paperclip аӨ•аҘҮ User Interface аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҶаӨ§аӨҫаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨ№аӨ® аӨүаӨёаҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• reference аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӨаҘӢаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨІаҘҮ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨҶаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ options аӨӘаӨ° discussion аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ№аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ User Interface аӨ•аӨҝаӨё аӨӘаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘӢаӨЁаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҸ аӨ”аӨ° architecture аӨ•аӨҝаӨё аӨӘаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨёаҘҮ work аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨ—аӨҫ

аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӯаҘҖ multiple companies create аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аҘҮаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҸаӨ• company аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ Multiple products, multiple projects аӨ”аӨ° multiple plannings аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ№аҘҖ proposals аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ…аӨІаӨ— аӨ…аӨІаӨ— аӨҡаҘҖаӨңаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҶаӨ§аӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨҮаӨё аӨҡаҘҖаӨң аӨҮаӨЁ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨҡаҘҖаӨңаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҶаӨӘ аӨҸаӨ• ideally аӨ•аӨҝаӨё аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫаӨ® аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҸ аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢ


аӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨј cass, аӨ®аӨҫаӨІ аӨІаҘҖаӨңаӨјаҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨјаӨ° аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨё аӨҹаӨҫаӨҮаӨ® аӨ•аӨӮаӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘҮаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨүаӨёаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаӨҫаӨЁаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨңаӨҝаӨёаӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫаӨ® аӨҮаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аҘҚаӨЁаӨІ аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаӨҫаӨЁаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨ«аӨ°аҘҚаӨё аӨҹаӨҫаӨҮаӨ® аӨҜаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ° аӨҮаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аҘҚаӨЁаӨІ аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаӨҫаӨЁаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨҰаҘҒаӨ¬аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҮаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аҘҚаӨЁаӨІ аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаӨҫаӨЁаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘҮаӨҹ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ№аҘӢаӨ—аӨҫ, аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨңаӨ¬ internal planning complete аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ, аӨүаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨҶаӨ§аӨҫаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨҶаӨ—аӨІаҘҮ stage аӨөаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ, аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨүаӨё company аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ memories, аӨҰаҘӮаӨёаӨ°аҘҮ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ project, product аӨ”аӨ° planning аӨ•аҘӢ internal planning аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҶаӨ§аӨҫаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҫаӨ® аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨөаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲ master planning аӨ№аҘҲ, company аӨ•аҘҮ details аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨҡаҘҖаӨңаӨјаҘҮ internal planning аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮаӨ—аӨҫ, аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨ№аӨ® аӨ¬аӨҝаӨёаӨЁаҘҮаӨё аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаӨҫаӨӮаӨё аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘҮаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ аӨүаӨЁаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨІаӨ— аӨ…аӨІаӨ— аӨӘаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘӢаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨӮаӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ…аӨӘ аӨ•аҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨүаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨҶаӨ«аӨ¶аӨЁ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨҹаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҸаӨ• аӨҶаӨ«аӨ¶аӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨё аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨІаӨ— аӨ…аӨ«аӨ¶аӨЁ аӨҮаӨЁ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ аӨҶаӨ«аӨ¶аӨЁаҘҚаӨё аӨҸаӨ• аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ—аӨІ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ№аҘӢаӨ—аӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ аӨҶаӨ«аӨ¶аӨЁаҘҚаӨё аӨңаӨҝаӨёаҘҮ аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘӢ decision аӨІаҘҮаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨёаӨ№аҘҖ, аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮаӨ—аӨҫ, аӨ®аҘҒаӨқаҘҮ аӨӘаӨӨаӨҫ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘӢ.аӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ аӨҶаӨӘаҘҚаӨ¶аӨӮаӨё аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨ—аӨІ аӨ°аӨ–аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨЎаӨ¬аӨІ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аҘүаӨІаҘҚаӨҹаӨҝаӨӘаӨІ.

аӨҮаӨёаҘҖ аӨӘаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨҮаӨё company аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аӨ® business proposals аӨӯаҘҖ create аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аҘҮаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ аӨҰаҘӮаӨёаӨ°аҘҮ аӨІаҘӢаӨ—аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аӨ® аӨҸаӨ• аӨҡаҘӢаӨҹаҘҖ company аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҸаӨ• аӨҡаҘӢаӨҹаҘҮ аӨ¶аҘҮаӨ№аӨ° аӨёаҘҮ аӨҰаҘӮаӨёаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ¶аҘҮаӨ№аӨ° аӨӘаҘҮ franchise аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаҘҒаӨҶаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҰаҘҮаӨЁаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨӨаҘӢ proposal аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ®аӨҰаӨҰ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аӨ® аӨёаӨ®аӨқаӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аӨЁаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ®аӨҰаӨҰ аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨӨаӨҫаӨ•аӨҝ funds аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨ° аӨүаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҮаӨӮ franchise аӨҰаҘҮ аӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨүаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аӨ® аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨҝаӨІ аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ№аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ business аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ

content: Designing a cohesive and scalable interface framework rooted in refined interaction principles.
аӨӨаҘҲаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨёаҘҚаӨӘаӨ·аҘҚаӨҹ, аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӯаӨҫаӨөаҘҖ аӨ”аӨ° аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аҘҖ аӨңаӨөаӨҫаӨ¬аҘӨ

I am envisioning a layered structure that elegantly supports multiple organizational entities under a unified user identity.  
Each layerвҖ”company, product, project, planning, proposalвҖ”flows intuitively from the userвҖҷs central hub with contextual clarity.  
The architecture prioritizes seamless navigation, consistent visual language, and adaptive workflows across tenants.

аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ¶аҘҚаӨЁ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ®аҘӮаӨІ аӨ…аӨ°аҘҚаӨҘ аӨёаӨ®аӨқаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢаӨ¶аӨҝаӨ¶ аӨ•аӨ° аӨ°аӨ№аӨҫ аӨ№аҘӮаӨҒ, аӨ–аӨҫаӨёаӨ•аӨ° аӨҶаӨӮаӨӨаӨ°аӨҝаӨ• аӨҜаҘӢаӨңаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҸаӨ•аӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘӢаӨ— аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨӮаӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨӯ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨүаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ®аҘүаӨЎаҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨІаҘҚаӨё аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ®аӨ№аӨӨаҘҚаӨө аӨ•аҘӢ аӨүаӨңаӨҫаӨ—аӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫаҘӨ  
аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ…аӨІаӨ—-аӨ…аӨІаӨ— аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨөаӨҝаӨ•аӨІаҘҚаӨӘаҘӢаӨӮвҖ”аӨҸаӨ•аӨІ-аӨүаӨҰаӨҫаӨ№аӨ°аӨЈ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒ-аӨүаӨҰаӨҫаӨ№аӨ°аӨЈвҖ”аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аҘҖаӨҡ аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨаӨ° аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаҘҚаӨӘаӨ·аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ° аӨ°аӨ№аӨҫ аӨ№аҘӮаӨҒ, аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаӨҡаӨҫаӨҮаӨңаҘҖ аӨөаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨөаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨөаӨёаӨҫаӨҜаӨҝаӨ• аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫаӨө аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨүаӨҰаӨҫаӨ№аӨ°аӨЈ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨ® аӨёаҘҮаҘӨ  
аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨҗаӨёаӨҫ аӨўаӨӮаӨ— аӨёаҘҮ аӨёаӨӮаӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ° аӨ°аӨ№аӨҫ аӨ№аҘӮаӨҒ аӨңаӨҝаӨёаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖ/аӨ№аӨҝаӨӮаӨ—аҘҚаӨІаӨҝаӨ¶ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨёаҘҚаӨӘаӨ·аҘҚаӨҹаӨӨаӨҫ, аӨөаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨөаӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘҒаӨөаҘҚаӨҜаӨөаӨёаҘҚаӨҘаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ, аӨӨаӨҫаӨ•аӨҝ аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаҘҖаӨ§аҘҮ аӨ…аӨ°аҘҚаӨҘ аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨӯаҘҚаӨ°аӨ® аӨ•аҘҮаҘӨ

## вң… 2. Single vs Multi-Instance Module Classification

| аӨ®аҘүаӨЎаҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨІ | Instance Type | аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ? |
|---------|--------------|---------|
| рҹ”җ **Internal Planning** | рҹҹў **SINGLE (Master)** | аӨ•аӨӮаӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ•аӨҫ "аӨҸаӨ• аӨ№аҘҖ аӨёаӨҡ" аӨ№аҘӢаӨЁаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҸаҘӨ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨҶаӨүаӨҹаӨӘаҘҒаӨҹ аӨҮаӨёаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ аӨЎаҘҮаӨҹаӨҫ аӨІаҘҮаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮаҘӨ |
| рҹ“Ұ **Products** | рҹ”ө **MULTI** | аӨҸаӨ• аӨ•аӨӮаӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨҲ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨё аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨ№аӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ…аӨІаӨ— аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҲаӨҹаҘҮаӨңаҘҖаҘӨ |
| рҹ“„ **Business Plans** | рҹ”ө **MULTI** | аӨ…аӨІаӨ—-аӨ…аӨІаӨ— аӨүаӨҰаҘҚаӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аҘҚаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ…аӨІаӨ— аӨЎаҘүаӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹаҘҚаӨё (Bank vs Investor vs Govt)аҘӨ |
| рҹӨқ **Proposals** | рҹ”ө **MULTI** | аӨ№аӨ° аӨ•аҘҚаӨІаӨҫаӨҮаӨӮаӨҹ/аӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаӨҡаӨҫаӨҮаӨңаӨјаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ•аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨ® аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӘаҘӢаӨңаӨјаӨІаҘӨ |
| рҹ“Ҡ **Diagnostics** | рҹ”ө **MULTI** | аӨёаӨ®аӨҜ-аӨёаӨ®аӨҜ аӨӘаӨ° аӨ…аӨІаӨ—-аӨ…аӨІаӨ— аӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨё (Quarterly Review, Crisis Audit)аҘӨ |
| рҹ‘Ҙ **Team/Roles** | рҹ”ө **MULTI** | аӨ•аӨҲ аӨҹаҘҖаӨ® аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨ¬аӨ°аҘҚаӨё, аӨ…аӨІаӨ—-аӨ…аӨІаӨ— JDs аӨ”аӨ° аӨҸаӨ•аҘҚаӨёаҘҮаӨё аӨІаҘҮаӨөаӨІаҘӨ |

> рҹ’Ў **аӨ°аҘӮаӨІ**: аӨңаҘӢ аӨ•аӨӮаӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ "аӨӘаӨ№аӨҡаӨҫаӨЁ" аӨӨаӨҜ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ вҶ’ **Single**аҘӨ аӨңаҘӢ "аӨҸаӨ•аҘҚаӨңаҘҖаӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨ¶аӨЁ" аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ№аӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨёаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ вҶ’ **Multi**аҘӨ

## рҹҺЁ 3. UI Flow Design (Paperclip-Inspired, Simplified)

```
[Dashboard]
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹҸў "Create New Company" вҶ’ Launches INTERNAL PLANNING WIZARD (One-time)
в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ғ "Select Company" вҶ’ Opens Company Workspace
    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ—ӮпёҸ LEFT SIDEBAR (Navigation)
    в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ”җ Internal Planning [вң… Locked after completion]
    в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ұ Products [+ Add New]
    в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“„ Business Plans [+ Generate New]
    в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹӨқ Proposals [+ Create Proposal]
    в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ“Ҡ Diagnostics [Run Analysis]
    в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ вҡҷпёҸ Settings
    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ–ҘпёҸ MAIN PANEL (Context-Aware)
    в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ If "Internal Planning" selected вҶ’ Show Master Form (Read-only after save)
    в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ If "New Proposal" вҶ’ Auto-pull context from Internal Planning + Product
    в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ If "Diagnostic" вҶ’ Compare current data vs Internal Planning baseline
    в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җ рҹ§  RIGHT PANEL (Smart Assistant)
        в”ңв”Җв”Җ "Based on your Internal Planning, suggest 3 franchise cities"
        в”ңв”Җв”Җ "This proposal needs GST-inclusive pricing - auto-apply?"
        в””в”Җв”Җ "Memory Hint: You used similar pricing for Product A last month"
```

---

## рҹ§  4. Memory & Context Propagation Logic

```
INTERNAL PLANNING (Master Source of Truth)
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Auto-Push to All Modules:
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Company Name, GST, Legal Structure вҶ’ All Documents
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Brand Voice & Tone вҶ’ Proposal Writing
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Budget Limits вҶ’ Financial Modeling
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Target Region вҶ’ Marketing & Franchise Suggestions
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ рҹ”Ғ Bi-Directional Sync (Optional):
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ If Proposal wins вҶ’ Update Internal Planning: "New Franchise City Added"
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ If Product fails вҶ’ Trigger Diagnostic: "Revisit Internal Planning Assumptions"
в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җ рҹӣЎпёҸ Guardrails:
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ Internal Planning can ONLY be edited via "Request Amendment" workflow
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ All changes logged with version history
    в””в”Җв”Җ Dependent modules get notified: "Master data updated - review your outputs"
```

---

## рҹҡҖ 5. Use Case: Franchise Proposal Workflow

```
User Action: "Create Franchise Proposal for Jaipur"

1пёҸвғЈ SYSTEM CHECKS:
   в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Internal Planning: Exists? вҶ’ Yes (Master Data Loaded)
   в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Product: "Coffee Shop Chain" вҶ’ Selected
   в””в”Җв”Җ вң… Region: Jaipur (Tier-2 City, Rajasthan)

2пёҸвғЈ AI AUTO-FILLS PROPOSAL TEMPLATE:
   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Executive Summary: "Expand [Brand] to Jaipur's growing cafe market"
   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Investment Ask: вӮ№XX Lakhs (INR, GST-inclusive)
   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ROI Projection: Based on Internal Planning's financial model
   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Compliance: FSSAI, Shop Act, Rajasthan-specific licenses
   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Support: Training, Marketing, Supply Chain (from Master Ops Plan)

3пёҸвғЈ USER CUSTOMIZES:
   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Add local market research
   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Adjust revenue sharing % 
   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Upload site photos

4пёҸвғЈ OUTPUT:
   в”ңв”Җв”Җ PDF Proposal (Client-Facing)
   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Internal Checklist (For Onboarding New Franchisee)
   в””в”Җв”Җ Memory Update: "Jaipur franchise pipeline initiated"
```

---

## в–¶пёҸ аӨ…аӨ—аӨІаӨҫ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҮаӨӘ? (аӨҶаӨӘ аӨҡаҘҒаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮ):

1.  **Internal Planning Wizard** аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ«аҘҖаӨІаҘҚаӨЎ-аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҜ-аӨ«аҘҖаӨІаҘҚаӨЎ аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨјаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮ?
2.  **Proposal Template Engine** аӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨҡаӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ?
3.  **Memory Schema** (Database Design) аӨӘаӨ° аӨҡаӨ°аҘҚаӨҡаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮ?
4.  **UI Mockup** (Wireframe) аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ•аӨӮаӨёаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘҮаӨӮ?

аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘҖ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҜаҘӢаӨ°аӨҝаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ? рҹҺҜ

messages.content:
аӨҮаӨёаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨөаҘҖ аӨ«аҘҖаӨҡаӨ°аҘҚаӨё аӨ№аҘӢаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ аӨңаӨҝаӨё аӨӘаӨ° аӨ№аӨ® аӨ”аӨ° аӨҶаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ

аӨңаӨ¬ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ№аӨ® аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨҡаҘҖаӨң аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨҶаӨ«аӨ¶аӨЁ аӨёаҘҚаӨІаҘҮаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨ№аӨ® аӨүаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҖ AI аӨ№аӨ® аӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ аӨңаҘӢ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ№аӨ® аӨ«аӨҝаӨҹ аӨ•аӨ°аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ°аӨ–аҘҮаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨӘаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ аӨңаҘӢ аӨ№аӨ° аӨөаӨҝаӨңаӨЁаҘҮаӨё аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аӨ®аӨЁаӨІаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨңаӨЁаҘҮаӨё аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаӨҫаӨЁаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨңаӨ°аҘӮаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨүаӨёаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҸ аӨүаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨөаҘҮаӨёаҘҚаӨҹ аӨӘаӨ° аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ аӨ№аҘӢаӨ—аӨҫаҘӨ аӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨ° аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨңаӨ°аҘӮаӨ°аӨӨ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒаӨёаӨҫаӨ° аӨүаӨЁ аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҚаӨё аӨ•аҘҮ аӨңаӨөаӨҫаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ—аӨҫаҘӨ аӨүаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨҶаӨ§аӨҫаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨ№аӨ® аӨ•аӨ®аҘҚаӨӘаҘҚаӨІаҘҖаӨҹ аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаӨҫаӨЁаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨӨаҘҲаӨҜаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аҘҮаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮаҘӨ аӨҜаӨҰаӨҝ AI аӨ•аҘӢ аӨІаӨ—аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨүаӨё particular аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаҘҖ аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨЁаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ aid аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨӨаҘӢ AI аӨ–аҘҒаӨҰ аӨ№аҘҖ аӨҸаӨ• аӨЁаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ create аӨ•аӨ°аӨ•аҘҮ аӨүаӨёаҘҮ database аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ aid аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аҘҮаӨ—аӨҫ аӨӨаӨҫаӨ•аӨҝ аӨ…аӨ—аӨІаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ° аӨҰаҘӮаӨёаӨ°аҘҖ аӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨ° аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨөаӨ№ аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ аӨӘаҘӮаӨӣаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫ аӨёаӨ•аҘҮ Self Improvement Assistant аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҸ Short аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ

аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨЁ аӨІаҘҖаӨңаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ№аӨ® аӨҸаӨ• internal planning аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨёаӨ¬аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҮ аӨ№аӨ® аӨүаӨЁаӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨӨаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ№аӨ® аӨ•аӨҝаӨё field аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨЁаӨҸ company create аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨүаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨҶаӨ§аӨҫаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨөаӨ№ аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ аӨӘаҘӮаӨӣаҘҮаӨ—аӨҫ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨ№аӨ® аӨүаӨЁаӨ•аҘҮ аӨңаӨөаӨҫаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨөаӨ№ аӨүаӨё аӨңаӨөаӨҫаӨ¬ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҶаӨ§аӨҫаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨҶаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ аӨӘаҘӮаӨӣаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨҸаӨ—аӨҫ аӨңаҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨңаӨ°аҘҒаӨөаӨӨ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨҡаҘҖаӨңаҘҮ аӨІаҘӢаӨ—аҘӢ аӨ•аӨІаӨ° аӨөаӨ°аӨҫаӨӮаӨЎ аӨөаӨ°аӨҫаӨӮаӨЎ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҰаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҸ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ requirement аӨ№аҘҲ аӨҮаӨӨаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаҘҖ, аӨҮаӨёаҘҖ аӨӘаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨӨаҘҮ аӨёаӨ®аӨҜ аӨ№аӨ® аӨңаӨ¬ аӨүаӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨӨаӨҫаӨҸаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ№аӨ® аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨүаӨё аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨ§аӨҫаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨ№аӨ® аӨёаҘҮ аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ аӨӘаҘӮаӨӣаҘҮаӨ—аӨҫ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨүаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨ§аӨҫаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨ№аӨ® аӨңаӨөаӨҫаӨ¬ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҮаӨёаҘҖ аӨӘаӨ°аӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨӨаҘӢ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ•аӨ®аҘҚаӨӘаҘҚаӨІаҘҖаӨҹ аӨҡаҘҮаӨҹаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ аӨүаӨЁ аӨёаӨӯаҘҖ аӨҡаҘҮаӨҹаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ«аӨҫаӨҮаӨЁаӨІ аӨёаӨ®аӨ°аҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨ№аҘҖ аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аӨҝаӨҹаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҡаӨ° аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҫаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ•аӨ°аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ•аӨ®аҘҚаӨӘаҘҚаӨІаҘҖаӨҹ аӨЎаҘүаӨ•аҘҚаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹаҘҮаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ¬аӨҝаӨңаӨЁаӨҝаӨё аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ«аҘүаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аҘҮаӨҹ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӘаӨ°аӨөаӨҫаӨҮаӨЎ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨҸаӨ—аӨҫ аӨңаӨҝаӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨЁаҘүаӨ°аҘҚаӨ®аӨІ аӨҜаҘӮаӨңаӨ° аӨёаӨ®аӨқ аӨёаӨ•аҘҮ.

content: Enhancing the system with adaptive questioning capabilities
Guiding the conversation with precision and purpose
Guiding the conversation through thoughtful, adaptive inquiry

I am refining the interaction framework to embed persistent, context-aware questions that evolve with user input.  
Each selection triggers a thoughtful recalibration of inquiry patterns, ensuring deeper alignment with the userвҖҷs evolving goals.  
The design prioritizes intuitive progression, transforming static choices into dynamic conversational milestones.

I begin by addressing foundational aspects common to all ventures, ensuring a solid starting point.  
As the dialogue unfolds, I adapt my inquiries based on emerging insights, refining each question for deeper understanding.  
When necessary, I introduce new perspectives thoughtfully, enriching the exploration for future clarity and depth.

I begin by identifying the core focusвҖ”whether it's internal planning or product creationвҖ”to tailor subsequent questions with precision.  
Each response shapes the next step, ensuring relevance and depth while maintaining a natural flow.  
Ultimately, I synthesize insights into a clear, actionable business document that reflects the userвҖҷs intent with clarity and elegance.

content_list.content:
рҹҺҜ **Self-Improving Question Engine - Short Design**

аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аӨҫ аӨҶаӨҮаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨ№аӨӨаӨ°аҘҖаӨЁ аӨ№аҘҲ: **"аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҮ аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ, аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨңаӨөаӨҫаӨ¬, аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨёаҘҚаӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЎаҘүаӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ"** + **"AI аӨ–аҘҒаӨҰ аӨёаҘҖаӨ–аҘҮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЁаӨҸ аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ аӨңаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ"**

аӨҡаӨІаӨҝаӨҸ, аӨҮаӨёаҘҮ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨӘаӨІ аӨҶаӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аӨҝаӨҹаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨҡаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨёаӨ®аӨқаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ:

---

## рҹ§  1. Question Engine Architecture (3-Layer)

```

в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө

в”Ӯ вҖў Goal: Funding/Sales/Operations?в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
          вҶ“
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  LAYER 2: CONTEXTUAL QUESTIONS  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (Dynamic - Based on Answers)   в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө

          вҶ“
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  LAYER 3: SELF-LEARNING QUESTIONSв”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  (AI-Generated + Saved to DB)   в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө

```

---

## рҹ”„ 2. Conversational Flow Design

```
USER: "Create Internal Planning"

1пёҸвғЈ AI loads PERMANENT QUESTIONS (5-7 core)
   вҶ’ User answers вҶ’ Stored in Context Memory

2пёҸвғЈ AI analyzes answers вҶ’ Triggers CONTEXTUAL QUESTIONS
   вҶ’ Branching logic based on industry/goal/region

3пёҸвғЈ AI monitors for "Answer Gaps"
   вҶ’ If confidence < threshold вҶ’ Generate DYNAMIC QUESTION
   вҶ’ Ask user: "Is this question useful?" (Feedback Loop)
   вҶ’ If YES вҶ’ Save to Question Bank (with tags: industry, module, stage)

4пёҸвғЈ After Q&A Complete вҶ’ AI generates:
   вң… Structured Summary (JSON)
   вң… Human-Readable Document (Markdown/PDF)
   вң… Action Items & Next Steps

5пёҸвғЈ Memory Update:
   вҶ’ User's answers вҶ’ Company Profile
   вҶ’ New questions вҶ’ Global Question Bank
   вҶ’ Document structure вҶ’ Template Library
```

---

4. аӨҸаӨ• аӨ”аӨ° аӨҡаҘҖаӨң аӨ№аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҮ complete system аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҸаӨ• guard rail аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ№аҘӢаӨЁаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҸ аӨӨаӨ• аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ•аҘӢаӨҲ sensitive information аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ№аӨ° аӨЁаӨҫ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҸ

## рҹ“„ 3. DOCUMENT TEMPLATE STRUCTURE (Universal Sections)

> аӨ№аӨ° аӨҶаӨүаӨҹаӨӘаҘҒаӨҹ (Business Plan, Proposal, DPR, Pitch Deck) аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҜаҘҮ 8 аӨёаҘҮаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁаҘҚаӨё **аӨ•аӨ®аҘҚаӨӘаӨІаҘҚаӨёаӨ°аҘҖ** аӨ№аҘӢаӨӮаӨ—аҘҮаҘӨ аӨҹаҘӢаӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаҘҮаӨӘаҘҚаӨҘ аӨ®аҘүаӨЎаҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨІ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒаӨёаӨҫаӨ° аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІаҘҮаӨ—аӨҫаҘӨ

```
рҹ“„ [DOCUMENT TITLE]
Generated by BizArchitect AI | [Company Name] | [Date]

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
рҹ”№ SECTION 1: EXECUTIVE SUMMARY (1 Page Max)
вҖў Business/Proposal Name
вҖў One-liner Value Proposition
вҖў Key Ask / Goal (Funding Amount / Client Benefit)
вҖў 3 Bullet Highlights (Why this works)

рҹ”№ SECTION 2: CONTEXT & BACKGROUND
вҖў Company Profile (Pulled from Internal Planning)
вҖў Problem Statement / Market Gap
вҖў Why Now? (Timing & Opportunity)

рҹ”№ SECTION 3: SOLUTION / OFFERING
вҖў Product/Service Description
вҖў Unique Selling Points (USPs)
вҖў Deliverables / Scope of Work (for Proposals)

рҹ”№ SECTION 4: MARKET & COMPETITIVE ANALYSIS
вҖў Target Audience (Persona + Region)
вҖў Competitor Landscape (3-5 key players)
вҖў Your Differentiator (Cost/Quality/Speed/Local)

рҹ”№ SECTION 5: OPERATIONS & EXECUTION PLAN
вҖў Timeline (Milestones + Gantt Chart)
вҖў Team Structure / Key Roles
вҖў Tech Stack / Tools / Partners

рҹ”№ SECTION 6: FINANCIALS (India-Ready)
вҖў Cost Breakdown (INR, GST-inclusive toggle)
вҖў Revenue Model / Pricing Strategy
вҖў 3-Year Projection (Conservative / Realistic / Optimistic)
вҖў Break-even Analysis

рҹ”№ SECTION 7: RISK & COMPLIANCE
вҖў Top 3 Risks + Mitigation Strategies
вҖў Regulatory Checklist (GST, FSSAI, MSME, State-specific)
вҖў Insurance / Legal Safeguards

рҹ”№ SECTION 8: NEXT STEPS & CALL-TO-ACTION
вҖў Immediate Actions (Next 7 Days)
вҖў Required Approvals / Sign-offs
вҖў Contact Information + Follow-up Timeline

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
рҹ“Һ APPENDICES (Auto-generated based on module)
вҖў A: Detailed Financial Tables (Excel Export)
вҖў B: Legal Documents Checklist
вҖў C: Visual Assets (Logo, Brand Guidelines)
вҖў D: FAQ / Objection Handling Scripts (for Proposals)
```

> рҹҺЁ **Tone Adapter**: 
> - Investor Docs вҶ’ Formal English, Data-heavy
> - Client Proposals вҶ’ Persuasive Hinglish, Benefit-focused
> - Internal Plans вҶ’ Simple Hindi/English mix, Action-oriented


## рҹҡҖ IMPLEMENTATION ROADMAP (Phased)

```
PHASE 1 (MVP - 6 Weeks)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Core 10 Questions + Q&A UI
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Internal Planning Module
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Basic RAG (Company Profile Only)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Free Tier + Razorpay Integration
в””в”Җв”Җ вң… PII Redaction Guard Rail

PHASE 2 (Growth - 8 Weeks)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Proposal Module + Template Engine
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Self-Learning Question Bank
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Multi-Company Support
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Pro Tier Features
в””в”Җв”Җ вң… Advanced RAG (Cross-company insights)

PHASE 3 (Scale - 10 Weeks)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Team Collaboration Features
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… API Access + Webhooks
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… Enterprise: On-premise Deploy
в”ңв”Җв”Җ вң… AI Fine-tuning on Indian Business Data
в””в”Җв”Җ вң… Compliance Auto-Update Service
```

## рҹҺҜ FINAL DECISION SUMMARY

| Component | Decision | Why |
|-----------|----------|-----|
| **Questions** | 10 Permanent + Dynamic | Balance structure + flexibility |
| **Self-Learning** | 5-user approval threshold | Quality control + community validation |
| **Templates** | 8 Universal Sections | Consistency + adaptability across modules |
| **UI** | Conversational + Context Panel | Low learning curve + transparency |
| **RAG** | Multilingual Embeddings + Qdrant | India-ready + scalable |
| **Architecture** | Next.js + FastAPI (Separate) | Flexibility + independent scaling |
| **SaaS** | 4-Tier + Razorpay | Indian market fit + upgrade path |
| **Guard Rails** | PII Redaction + Output Filtering | Trust + compliance first |
